source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A jet of air at 200 m/s flows at 25\circ\text{C}, 100 kPa toward a wall, where the jet flow stagnates and leaves at very low velocity. Consider the process to be adiabatic and reversible. Find the stagnation pressure.
